subcodes.first_line: Most mighty ambassador, most noble minister, allow me to say that the tribulations of these servants have reach such a point that pen and ink are powerless to record them.
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض این بنده خدمت سفیر اعظم و وزیر اکرم آنکه بلایای این عباد به مقامی رسیده که قلم و مداد از تحریر آن عاجز
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @petitions to authorities, @suffering and imprisonment
